category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tcpdump as a command-line packet analyzer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives tcpdump; current_curation.display-name also gives tcpdump.
docs_sources: Official tcpdump site provides the tcpdump manpage; official The Tcpdump Group GitHub repository provides the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official The Tcpdump Group GitHub repository identifies anonymous Git for tcpdump at this source-control URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says command-line packet analyzer; official repository describes tcpdump as network monitoring and data acquisition source code.
